ogTitle: Schell Well vs Seacliff: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Schell Well and Seacliff.
heading: Schell Well vs Seacliff — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Schell Well, South Australia and Seacliff, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Seacliff has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Schell Well (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Schell Well or Seacliff safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Schell Well has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Seacliff scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Schell Well scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Seacliff scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Schell Well or Seacliff?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Seacliff has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
